title: 打推销电话不尬聊！5句让老外秒接话的职场英语💡

cover.style_keywords: 简约商务风、蓝白渐变、手绘电话图标、清爽字体、带微光效果

slides.scene_title: 开场破冰：别一上来就报身份
slides.wrong_cn: 我是XX公司，我打电话是想卖您产品…
slides.wrong_en: Hi, I’m from ABC Co., and I’m calling to sell you something.
slides.correct_en: Hi there — this is [Name] calling from [Team/Dept], hope I caught you at a good time?
slides.correct_cn: 你好呀～我是[名字]，来自[团队/部门]，没打扰到你吧？

dialogue.a: Hi there — this is Maya calling from Customer Success, hope I caught you at a good time?
dialogue.a_cn: 你好呀～我是客户成功部的Maya，没打扰到你吧？
dialogue.b: Oh hey Maya! Yeah, just grabbing coffee — what’s up?
dialogue.b_cn: 哦嘿Maya！刚好在喝咖啡——有啥事？

slides.tip: 用‘hope I caught you at a good time’代替‘sorry to bother you’，更自信不卑微；‘Hi there’比‘Hello’更自然亲切～

slides.wrong_cn: 我们有个很棒的产品想推荐给您
slides.wrong_en: We have a great product we’d like to recommend to you.
slides.correct_en: We’ve been helping teams like yours with [specific pain point] — thought I’d share how it’s working for others.
slides.correct_cn: 我们一直在帮像你们这样的团队解决[具体痛点]，想和你分享下别人是怎么搞定的。

dialogue.a: We’ve been helping SaaS teams like yours streamline onboarding — thought I’d share how it’s working for others.
dialogue.a_cn: 我们一直在帮SaaS团队简化入职流程，想和你分享下别人是怎么搞定的。
dialogue.b: Hmm, onboarding *is* messy for us right now… tell me more?
dialogue.b_cn: 嗯…我们这会儿入职流程确实一团乱…说说看？

slides.tip: 把‘sell’藏进‘helping’里，用‘teams like yours’制造认同感，客户瞬间觉得‘这人懂我’！

slides.scene_title: 应对拒绝①：当对方说‘现在没兴趣’
slides.wrong_cn: 那我加您微信，以后再联系？
slides.wrong_en: Can I add you on WeChat and follow up later?
slides.correct_en: Totally get it — no pitch today. Mind if I circle back in [X weeks/months] when things settle?
slides.correct_cn: 完全理解——今天绝不推销！方便我[X周/月]后等你们节奏稳了再简单同步下？

dialogue.a: Totally get it — no pitch today. Mind if I circle back in 6 weeks when your Q3 planning wraps up?
dialogue.a_cn: 完全理解——今天绝不推销！方便我6周后等你们Q3规划收尾了再简单同步下？
dialogue.b: Yeah, that actually works — ping me then!

slides.tip: 用‘circle back’代替‘contact again’，地道又专业；加上具体时间锚点（如‘Q3 planning’），显得你真的研究过对方！

slides.scene_title: 应对拒绝②：当对方说‘我们有供应商了’
slides.wrong_cn: 那您能介绍我们认识一下吗？
slides.wrong_en: Can you introduce us to your current supplier?
slides.correct_en: Got it — out of curiosity, what’s working really well with them? (pause) …That’s helpful — we actually specialize in exactly that gap.
slides.correct_cn: 明白啦～好奇问下，他们哪块做得特别好？（停顿）…原来如此！这恰恰是我们最擅长补上的缺口。

dialogue.a: Got it — out of curiosity, what’s working really well with them? …That’s helpful — we actually specialize in exactly that gap.
dialogue.a_cn: 明白啦～好奇问下，他们哪块做得特别好？…原来如此！这恰恰是我们最擅长补上的缺口。
dialogue.b: Haha, fair question — their reporting is solid, but our team spends hours cleaning data first…
dialogue.b_cn: 哈哈，好问题——他们报表是挺稳，但我们团队得先花几小时清洗数据…

slides.tip: 先真诚提问+停顿，展现倾听；再用‘specialize in that gap’悄悄植入价值，不硬推，但精准扎心！

slides.scene_title: 礼貌收尾：挂电话前留个‘钩子’
slides.wrong_en: Thank you for your time — goodbye!
slides.correct_en: Thanks so much — I’ll send over that [resource/case study] I mentioned. And if anything jumps out, just hit reply!
slides.correct_cn: 超感谢！我马上把提到的[资料/案例]发你邮箱～有任何想法，随时回邮件哈！

dialogue.a: Thanks so much — I’ll send over that Shopify onboarding checklist I mentioned. And if anything jumps out, just hit reply!
dialogue.a_cn: 超感谢！我马上把提到的Shopify入职清单发你邮箱～有任何想法，随时回邮件哈！

slides.tip: 结尾给‘可执行的小行动’（发资料/清单）+ ‘低门槛回应方式’（hit reply），转化率直接拉高3倍！

caption:
90%的人第一句话就把客户吓跑了——真正专业的推销，从来不说‘I want to sell you something’！✅这5句不是背稿，是‘思维切换’：从‘我要卖’变成‘我来帮’。语调放松点，像跟朋友聊工作，反而更可信～你最常卡在哪一步？开场？被拒？还是收尾不敢留钩子？👇评论区蹲你的实战故事！✨收藏这篇，下次cold call前扫一眼，气场直接拿捏～

#职场英语 #销售英语 #coldcall技巧 #英语口语 #外贸人必备 #商务英语 #英语干货 #小红书英语课
